component.name: PiLauncher
component.summary: 专为手柄设计的 Minecraft 启动器

description.p: PiLauncher 是一款为游戏手柄和掌机量身定制的 Minecraft 启动器。它拥有为主机式体验优化的全屏用户界面，让你可以轻松地使用手柄管理、配置和运行你的 Minecraft 游戏实例。

PiLauncher is a Minecraft launcher tailored for gamepads and handheld consoles. It features a full-screen, console-like user interface optimized for controller inputs, allowing you to easily manage and launch your Minecraft instances.

ul.li: 完全支持手柄操作，提供沉浸式大屏体验。
Full gamepad support for an immersive large-screen experience.
自动识别和配置手柄相关模组。
Automatic detection and configuration of gamepad-related mods.
极简且现代化的实例和模组管理。
Minimalist and modern instance and mod management.

description.p: 全新升级至 Vite 8 与 TailwindCSS v4 构建引擎，并深度优化手柄选项按钮与低分辨率搜索栏布局，修复高频缩放报错与资源图标跨域下载问题。

ul.li: [优化] 全面升级底层打包与样式构建引擎至 Vite 8 与 TailwindCSS v4.3.3。
[优化] 采用标准 CSS Cascade Layers 机制重构页签导航特定样式，修复在 v4 级联层下选项按钮被 w-max 工具类挤压粘连的问题。
[修复] 为窗口缩放监听引入防抖机制，彻底消除连续缩放时高频并发调用 Rust 接口导致的 Tauri 临时回调 ID 丢失报错。
[修复] 新增 Rust 侧网络代理下载与 Base64 转换指令，内置官方 CDN 安全白名单，完美解决前端缓存资源图标时的跨域 (CORS) 限制。
[优化] 优化低分辨率与 Steam Deck 视图下的下载搜索栏布局，移除 justify-self-center 居中对齐，并拓宽网格占比至 9 列，使输入框可完整横向撑开。

description.p: Upgraded to Vite 8 and TailwindCSS v4, refined focus toggle and low-res search layouts, and resolved scaling errors and CORS icon download issues.

ul.li: [Optimization] Upgraded build tools and style engine to Vite 8 and TailwindCSS v4.3.3.
[Optimization] Restructured tab navigation styles using native CSS Cascade Layers to fix option button layout squeeze.
[Fix] Added debouncing to the window resize listener, preventing duplicate IPC calls and resolving Tauri callback ID errors.
[Fix] Implemented Rust-side network proxy for image downloading to completely bypass browser CORS restrictions when caching icons.
[Optimization] Improved download search bar layout on Steam Deck (compact mode) by removing justify-self-center and expanding column grid spanning.
